item.title: Goodbye our beloved Imgurian friend
item.description: This one is my favorite. That mischievous smile, just having a great time♥️ I’ve added the memorial post I’ve made for our dear friend. Take a moment and read it. Be kind to one another, love each other ♥️ You’ll never be forgotten sweet Becca. https://imgur.com/gallery/hWLwYFA

item.title: Light a candle for our beloved Imgurian @Benedictcucumberpatch
item.description:
Our friend has been taken from us today. She bravely chose to decide when to shut her own door on this last adventure here on earth. Many , like myself have recently found her posts about living her last days traveling around with her not always trusty “Dobby” camper van. Taking us along with her sharing beautiful pictures and videos. Her positivity was something that was incredible. Still choosing to smile in the face of the greatest and most terrifying battle of her short 26 years on this rock. I am in awe of her bravery. I’ve cried and kept her close to my heart these last few days… Moved by her spirit, and kinds words she has left us all to ponder on. Hold fast Becca, this next journey is beyond all of us. I pray that you finally found your peace and are now existing somewhere beyond the clouds , flying free… free from pain, free from the body that was failing you. I’ll light a candle for you , you’ll never be forgotten. If there was any lesson I’ve learned from her it’s too live life to the fullest!!! Hug your loved ones!!! Make beautiful memories !! And always chose love and kindness ♥️ in the face of the hardest days of our lives. One last toast (salud) to our brave girl !!! @benedictcucumberpatch
The outpouring of love from all of you incredible people has really touched my ♥️ heart. Thank you for taking the time to read my post of our lovely and never forgotten Imgurian friend Becca ♥️ Love each other……
item.dc:creator: Mayyybe

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes - A Dump for Paul #19
item.description: Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He has applied for disability and various forms of both state and local aid, but he is still waiting, and in the meantime he has to pay rent. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8IwCPIC0xc (Previous fundraiser was here https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u) ****EDIT**** - Most viral, woo-hoo! Thank to everyone who has upvoted and favorited and donated. I post these dumps every few days and we didn’t get much reaction or any donations for the last 7 days and that’s always a little scary because this is the only way Paul is paying bills right now (still wait listed for various forms of aid, and still waiting on temporary disability and he’s been waiting on that since before they gave him a terminal diagnosis). I’m the only family on social media, and things like Facebook and Instagram aren’t really my wheelhouse. It’s a fair bit of pressure for a lowly meme hunter like myself. But tonight I was blown away with the donations and the engagement, thank you guys, from the bottom of my heart, thank you ❤️you are helping him tremendously both in the day to day and in the ‘long’ run. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 11-https://imgur.com/gallery/Q2WKIPi 12 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkoK6mb 13- https://imgur.com/gallery/A3PI7ur 14- https://imgur.com/gallery/z8a2fuX 15 - https://imgur.com/gallery/59sfisF 16 - https://imgur.com/gallery/uvZueER 17 - https://imgur.com/gallery/Dmi0hX3 18 - https://imgur.com/gallery/5qbONFr

item.title: I Painted This Today
item.description: Thanks for watching! View the full process video on my YouTube channel here: https://youtu.be/WjbU96IUthA This is "Towering" oil on a 16" x 20" canvas. If you’re interested, My Etsy shop: www.etsy.com/shop/HaleyGrecoArtwork My Instagram: www.instagram.com/haley.greco.artwork Most viral edit: Thank you so much you guys!! You inspire me!
item.dc:creator: haleygrecoartwork

item.title: Art by NaBaBa

item.title: Crater rim as tall as a 5 story building collapsed
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/reel/CWoE6wQKFCe/ By the drone operator: "Luckiest drone shot ever? I happened to be flying over the Fagradalsfjall volcanic crater when part of the crater rim collapsed. That part may look “small”, but it’s actually around the same size of a 5 story building!"
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: The truth about the dangers of marijuana
item.description: Most Viral Edit: from the comments I have gleaned two things: 1. Bill's a dick (haven't thought about him in years so I have no skin in that game). 2. Some of you think someone here is saying that marijuana is completely without risk. No one is saying that. They're saying it's not as dangerous as alcohol. I agree with that statement and I could see an argument for incidents vs. availability as a counter point but no one is disputing that either.
item.dc:creator: ahorseelbowdeepinme

item.title: Help find my cousin Jason
item.description: My cousin is missing from Golden Colorado. We are hoping he returns home soon. Please share and call the police with any information. Anyone who sees Abel is asked to call Jefferson County Sheriff in Colorado at 303-271-0211 or 911. https://www.thedenverchannel.com/news/local-news/jeffco-sheriffs-office-searching-for-missing-at-risk-teen Updates available from the Jefferson County sheriff Facebook. https://www.facebook.com/JeffersonCountySheriff
